title: Firefly Dashboard
author: Your Name <you@example.com>
tagline: A cleaner Firefly-III interface with Cloudron SSO

FIREFLY_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of your Firefly-III instance, e.g. https://firefly.yourdomain.com

FIREFLY_TOKEN.description: Firefly-III Personal Access Token (create one in Firefly under Profile → OAuth)

SESSION_SECRET.description: Random secret string for session encryption (generate with: openssl rand -hex 32)
